summary_en: 21,000 shares (0.75% of shares outstanding) to be acquired via ToSTNeT-3 off-auction trade on 27 May 2026 at reference price of ¥2,360/share; aggregate limit ¥60.0M. For restricted stock awards and capital-policy flexibility.
title_en: Notice of Acquisition of Treasury Stock and Purchase of Treasury Stock via Off-Auction Trade (ToSTNeT-3)
translation_en_brief: On 26 May 2026, the board of directors of Koryojyuhan Co., Ltd. resolved to acquire treasury stock using the off-auction trade mechanism (ToSTNeT-3) on the Tokyo Stock Exchange. The company will execute a single block purchase on 27 May 2026 at 08:45 JST at the reference price of ¥2,360 per share. The acquisition targets up to 21,000 shares, representing 0.75% of shares outstanding (excluding treasury stock), with an aggregate limit of ¥60.0 million. The stated purposes are to secure shares for future restricted stock awards to executives and employees, and to enable flexible capital-allocation decisions in response to changing business conditions and to improve capital efficiency. The company noted that Chairman Usui Muneaki has indicated an intention to sell a portion of his shareholding; the board excluded him from deliberations on the acquisition to avoid conflicts of interest, and the use of ToSTNeT-3 at the previous day's closing reference price ensures price objectivity and equal treatment of all shareholders.
